practicals.title: Listening and Speaking Assessment
practicals.details: Formal assessment of Listening and Speaking skills worth 05 marks, focusing on practical application of language skills as per CBSE guidelines.

activities.title: Reading Comprehension Practice
activities.details: Students engage in reading discursive passages (400-450 words) and case-based factual passages with visual input (200-250 words) to practice comprehension, interpretation, analysis, inference, evaluation, and vocabulary skills.

activities.title: Grammar Accuracy Drill
activities.details: Students practice Determiners, Tenses, Modals, Subject-verb concord, and Reported speech through Gap Filling, Editing, and Transformation exercises to ensure accurate use of spelling, punctuation, and grammar.

activities.title: Descriptive Writing Workshop
activities.details: Students write descriptive paragraphs (100-120 words) based on visual or verbal cues describing a person, event, or situation.

activities.title: Creative Storytelling Session
activities.details: Students compose a story on a given cue/title or a diary entry (100-120 words) to develop creative expression.

activities.title: Literature Context Analysis
activities.details: Students analyze extracts from Drama/Prose and Poetry to assess interpretation, analysis, inference, evaluation, appreciation, and vocabulary.

activities.title: Short Answer Discussion
activities.details: Students answer short answer type questions (40-50 words) from Beehive and Moments to assess interpretation, analysis, inference, and evaluation.

activities.title: Long Answer Creative Writing
activities.details: Students answer long answer type questions (100-120 words) from Beehive and Moments focusing on creativity, imagination, extrapolation beyond the text, theme interpretation, or character sketches.

activities.title: Role Play and Skit Performance
activities.details: Students participate in role plays, skits, or dramatizations based on prose texts to encourage classroom interaction and expression of ideas.

activities.title: Group Discussion Forum
activities.details: Students engage in group discussions to express their views, defend their opinions, and participate actively in class.

activities.title: Listening and Speaking Practice
activities.details: Regular practice of listening and speaking skills through activities designed to assess communication competencies.

projects.title: Art-Integrated Literature Project
projects.details: Students create art-integrated projects based on activities like Role Play, Skit, or Dramatization of prescribed texts to demonstrate understanding and creativity.

marks_distribution: Section B: Writing Skills and Grammar - 20 Marks
Section C: Language through Literature - 40 Marks
question_paper_design: Reading Comprehension: Discursive passage (400-450 words, 10 marks) and Case-based factual passage with visual input (200-250 words, 10 marks)
Grammar: Determiners, Tenses, Modals, Subject-verb concord, Reported speech (Gap Filling/Editing/Transformation, 10 marks)
Writing Skills: Descriptive Paragraph (100-120 words, 5 marks) and Story/Diary Entry (100-120 words, 5 marks)
Reference to Context: Extracts from Drama/Prose (5+5 marks) and Poetry (5+5 marks)
Short Answer Questions: Beehive (4x3=12 marks) and Moments (3x2=6 marks)
Long Answer Questions: Beehive (6 marks) and Moments (6 marks)
competency_weightage: Reading Comprehension: Conceptual understanding, decoding, analyzing, inferring, interpreting, vocabulary
Writing Skills & Grammar: Creative expression, reasoning, justifying, appropriate style/tone, format, fluency, accuracy
Language through Literature: Recalling, reasoning, appreciating, applying literary conventions, identifying themes/messages
practical_assessment: Listening and Speaking activities assessed internally
Guidelines refer to Circular no. Acad-33/2020
project_assessment: Art-integrated projects based on Role Play, Skit, Dramatization

previousSessionContext: A Truly Beautiful Mind: Understanding Einstein's Humanity and Genius: We learned that Einstein's legacy is not just his theories, but his character.
